requirement_topic.en: OCPP, EMC, Radio Modules, and Power Quality — Denmark
requirement_topic.zh: OCPP、EMC、无线模块及电能质量——丹麦
requirement_topic.zht: OCPP、EMC、無線模組及電能質量——丹麥

summary.en: Networked EV chargers in Denmark should be specified for OCPP back-office interoperability where a charge-point operator, fleet operator, public-sector project, or DSO-linked programme requires remote monitoring, billing, diagnostics, or load management. Denmark has one of Europe's most advanced smart-charging ecosystems, and OCPP 2.0.1 is the preferred version for new deployments. Electrical and electronic emissions and immunity evidence should align with IEC 61000 EMC and power-quality standards and support CE marking under EMC Directive 2014/30/EU. Cellular, Wi-Fi, RFID, payment, or smart-metering modules may trigger additional requirements under RED 2014/53/EU. Denmark's DSOs increasingly require smart-charging profiles and demand-response capability for commercial and public charging installations.
summary.zh: 在丹麦，若充电点运营商、车队运营方、公共部门项目或配电运营商相关计划要求远程监控、计费、诊断或负载管理，联网充电桩应按OCPP后台互操作进行规定。丹麦拥有欧洲最先进的智能充电生态之一，新部署首选OCPP 2.0.1版本。电气和电子发射及抗扰度证据应与IEC 61000 EMC和电能质量标准一致，并支持依据电磁兼容指令2014/30/EU的CE标志。蜂窝、Wi-Fi、RFID、支付或智能计量模块可能触发RED 2014/53/EU项下的额外要求。丹麦配电运营商日益要求商业和公共充电安装具备智能充电方案和需求响应能力。
summary.zht: 在丹麥，若充電點運營商、車隊運營方、公共部門項目或配電運營商相關計劃要求遠程監控、計費、診斷或負載管理，聯網充電樁應按OCPP後台互操作進行規定。丹麥擁有歐洲最先進的智能充電生態之一，新部署首選OCPP 2.0.1版本。電氣和電子發射及抗擾度證據應與IEC 61000 EMC和電能品質標準一致，並支持依據電磁相容指令2014/30/EU的CE標誌。蜂窩、Wi-Fi、RFID、支付或智能計量模組可能觸發RED 2014/53/EU項下的額外要求。丹麥配電運營商日益要求商業和公共充電安裝具備智能充電方案和需求響應能力。

standards_or_laws: OCPP 2.0.1 — Open Charge Point Protocol for networked EV chargers (preferred version for new Denmark deployments)
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC 61851-24 — digital communication between DC EV charging station and EV
EMC Directive 2014/30/EU — mandatory CE marking for EMC compliance
RED 2014/53/EU — applicable where wireless modules are incorporated
Forsyningstilsynet and DSO requirements for smart-charging and demand-response capability

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 CAN communication between the off-board charger and vehicle BMS. This is not OCPP back-office communication and is not the CCS2 communication direction. China-market chargers may also include China-specific payment, SIM, cloud, and operator integrations that need reconfiguration for Danish operators, roaming, language, currency, and data interfaces. Chinese chargers typically do not support OCPP 2.0.1 or ISO 15118 Plug & Charge out of the box for EU deployment.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023 CAN通信，用于非车载充电机与车辆BMS之间通信。该协议不是OCPP后台通信，也不是CCS2通信方向。中国市场充电桩还可能包含中国特定支付、SIM卡、云平台和运营商集成，需要为丹麦运营商、漫游、语言、货币和数据接口重新配置。中国充电桩通常不开箱即支持面向欧盟部署的OCPP 2.0.1或ISO 15118即插即充。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023 CAN通訊，用於非車載充電機與車輛BMS之間通訊。該協議不是OCPP後台通訊，也不是CCS2通訊方向。中國市場充電樁還可能包含中國特定支付、SIM卡、雲平台和運營商集成，需要為丹麥運營商、漫遊、語言、貨幣和數據接口重新配置。中國充電樁通常不開箱即支持面向歐盟部署的OCPP 2.0.1或ISO 15118即插即充。

standards_or_laws: China radio module approvals where applicable

gap.en: Exporters must confirm the OCPP version (2.0.1 preferred in Denmark), charge-point-management-system integration, remote diagnostics, load management, smart-charging profiles for DSO demand-response, payment or RFID flow, SIM or communications module CE marking and radio-type approval (RED 2014/53/EU), and IEC 61000 EMC reports for the final Denmark configuration. For DC CCS2 products, GB/T 27930 must not be presented as the relevant communication evidence — the correct protocol stack is ISO 15118 / DIN 70121 (PLC) for CCS2 vehicle-charger communication. Harmonic current and immunity data should be reviewed against the specific DSO supply point constraints in Denmark. Danish-language operator interfaces and documentation may be expected.
gap.zh: 出口商必须确认最终丹麦配置的OCPP版本（丹麦首选2.0.1）、充电点管理系统集成、远程诊断、负载管理、配电运营商需求响应智能充电方案、支付或RFID流程、SIM或通信模块CE标志和无线型式认证（RED 2014/53/EU），以及IEC 61000 EMC报告。对于直流CCS2产品，不得将GB/T 27930作为相关通信证据提交——CCS2车辆-充电机通信的正确协议栈为ISO 15118 / DIN 70121（PLC）。谐波电流和抗扰度数据应结合丹麦具体配电运营商供电点约束进行审查。可能还需要提供丹麦语运营商界面和文件。
gap.zht: 出口商必須確認最終丹麥配置的OCPP版本（丹麥首選2.0.1）、充電點管理系統集成、遠程診斷、負載管理、配電運營商需求響應智能充電方案、支付或RFID流程、SIM或通訊模組CE標誌和無線型式認證（RED 2014/53/EU），以及IEC 61000 EMC報告。對於直流CCS2產品，不得將GB/T 27930作為相關通訊證據提交——CCS2車輛-充電機通訊的正確協議棧為ISO 15118 / DIN 70121（PLC）。諧波電流和抗擾度數據應結合丹麥具體配電運營商供電點約束進行審查。可能還需要提供丹麥語運營商介面和文件。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific but commonly mandatory for networked public, fleet, or DSO-linked chargers in Denmark; EMC Directive 2014/30/EU CE marking mandatory; RED 2014/53/EU mandatory where wireless modules incorporated; OCPP and smart-charging profiles effectively required for Denmark commercial and public deployments
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is China domestic DC vehicle-charger communication and is not OCPP or CCS2 back-office evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Denmark networked chargers should be validated for OCPP 2.0.1 integration, IEC 61000 EMC and power quality, CE marking under EMC Directive 2014/30/EU, RED compliance for wireless modules, and DSO smart-charging and demand-response requirements. GB/T 27930 alone does not satisfy OCPP, CCS2 communication, or back-office interoperability needs. Verify current Forsyningstilsynet and DSO smart-charging requirements directly before Denmark deployment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 丹麦联网充电桩应验证OCPP 2.0.1集成、IEC 61000 EMC和电能质量、依据电磁兼容指令2014/30/EU的CE标志、无线模块的无线设备指令合规，以及配电运营商智能充电和需求响应要求。仅有GB/T 27930不能满足OCPP、CCS2通信或后台互操作需求。丹麦部署前请直接核实当前供应监管局和配电运营商的智能充电要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 丹麥聯網充電樁應驗證OCPP 2.0.1集成、IEC 61000 EMC和電能品質、依據電磁相容指令2014/30/EU的CE標誌、無線模組的無線設備指令合規，以及配電運營商智能充電和需求響應要求。僅有GB/T 27930不能滿足OCPP、CCS2通訊或後台互操作需求。丹麥部署前請直接核實當前供應監管局和配電運營商的智能充電要求。
